name: Warrior cats rpg
description:
You are a Loner, wandering through the forest trying to hunt your lunch, unfortunately you're caught by a patrol of clan cats. They take you to their camp so their leader can decide your fate. --- *TW: POSSIBLE ANIMAL DEATH AND VIOLENCE* *the clan you're in, can be one from the books or original one, heck, if you want, you don't even need to be a clan cat, go bananas, make your own clan, idc.* *I recommend reading the token before starting a chat, but feel free to not do so.* *I found it interesting to play using a dice to see how well you perform based on luck. if the bot forgets or acts weird, it's not my fault (probably). I do recommend using open ai, but should work on llm. llm can be quite horny....so, please shut down any Sexual approach. These are cats, people! I really want to see you guys adventures so please make chats public. also if possibe please leave a review.*

*Update! I found out how to add pictures to the description, yay*

*Here are some of the cats that appear, just so you can visualize it better :)*
creator: PrinceElios
